name: Spanish Style Codfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the pimento-stuffed olives.
2. Rinse excess salt from the cod and soak overnight in cold water, changing several times. Drain and cut into serving size pieces.
3. Cook onion and garlic in oil until onion is tender but not browned.
4. Add fish pieces and cook until lightly browned.
5. Add undrained tomatoes, pimentos, and pepper. Simmer, covered, about 20 minutes or until fish tests done.
6. Add sherry and heat through.
7. Garnish with sliced olives.
